_meta.description: Test data aliases for @td() references in suite CSVs. Syntax: @td(ALIAS.field) or @td(file, filter, column)

CFG_LAPTOP.notes: Two required Product sections (RAM, Storage). 9 price combos $999-$1399. For GraphQL configuration suite (050i).

CFG_RING.notes: Required Text section, maxLength=30. For Text-section validation tests.

CFG_GIFTBOX.notes: Optional Text section, maxLength=100. For optional Text happy path.

CFG_HOODIE.notes: Non-configurable product baseline. productConfiguration should return empty/null configurationSections.

CFG_CONDITIONAL_BIKE.notes: VCST-4713 conditional cascade A->B->C with sibling D. Tests dependsOnSectionId in productConfiguration response.

CFG_CONDITIONAL.notes: VCST-4713 conditional sections. 4 sections, dependency chain A→B→C with D sibling of B (both depend on A). Section IDs: A=a3ea3283-c40e-44c1-9534-c1a3cc06da75 (Frame Type, REQUIRED), B=8ad69de5-31b0-4b4b-b233-fd69b4f1a4e2 (Wheel Set, dependsOn A), D=b0b1692a-c663-4f66-ac3f-2f3307b1ff42 (Frame Color, dependsOn A), C=12fbadbf-b1e8-496e-9576-18b929a654a8 (Tire Type, dependsOn B). Config ID: d5b63b79-d9a4-45a4-9722-694189f1144e. Section IDs now stable across re-runs (seed script preserves them by name).

CFG_WEDDING_CAKE_CONDITIONAL.notes: VCST-4713 toast-Save bug reproduction product. Wedding cake with chained conditional sections: Base (req, root) -> Creme (opt) -> Message (opt) -> Custom text required (Text, req, dep Message). Section IDs: Base=ef19c414-1172-4ad3-a6c6-1e5dec515474, Creme=5f93bee5-6913-4e63-9a60-14b3718029a8, Message=19e27d3a-77e8-4b9e-b546-860f58b1a46a, Custom text required=a251777f-654b-43aa-8074-5b5820f48fb4 (isRequired=true, type=Text), Image=7ebe866a-4385-40f2-8e22-d8257d0c87e6 (File, opt, dep Message). Product GUID: f4f27033-d688-4d22-ade7-5106f4748add. Slug: sections-with-conditions-wedding-cake.

CFG_TEXT_DRIVEN_COND.notes: VCST-4713 CFG-024. Text parent triggers child visibility. Dependency graph: A=Text (req, root) 'Engraving Line 1' -> B=Product (opt) 'Style Pack' -> C=Product (opt) 'Accessory'. Base product ID: 6304cd10-9610-42d9-9998-2f75af235bcd. Section IDs: A=076326d6-0f20-430c-8a29-d9ed664c5092, B=b05a74e1-715e-4931-9938-bbe7499510e5, C=8295efb4-ee2b-4fd6-a292-3733d7f97b63. Config ID: 5ff23016-4790-4658-9470-0cdf244886b5. Slug: agent-test-text-driven-cond-20260413.

CFG_FILE_DRIVEN_COND.notes: VCST-4713 CFG-025. File parent as dependency driver. Dependency graph: A=File (req, root) 'Design Upload' -> B=Product (opt) 'Finish Type' -> C=Text (opt) 'Notes'. Base product ID: f764f2e6-bb00-428e-959d-3623a3c0e9d1. Section IDs: A=f232e482-d35d-4a85-aac6-f41701b10aa4, B=766cdb19-919b-4163-bf8e-12ee8f02b046, C=8b2cd459-5459-4b18-bdd9-052c2812bb76. Config ID: 69f32cef-e57f-4be5-a4b9-02e86ffb396d. Slug: agent-test-file-driven-cond-20260413.

CFG_REQUIRED_FILE_CHILD.notes: VCST-4713 CFG-026. Required File section gates checkout. Dependency graph: A=Product (req, root) 'Service Plan' -> B=File (req) 'ID Proof'. Base product ID: 1d8bb891-f37b-4a9c-af0d-62409772c75e. Section IDs: A=28a1f250-9558-4e35-8723-a53123508ee4, B=0f4c69b6-404c-4d5a-8a8c-936a6cd0c472. Config ID: 6be61d28-be40-4889-b51d-12d30d70f3ec. Slug: agent-test-req-file-child-20260413.

CFG_TWO_REQ_SIBLINGS.notes: VCST-4713 CFG-027. Both siblings required — Add to Cart disabled until both filled. Dependency graph: A=Product (opt with None, root) 'Bundle Choice' -> B=Product (req) 'Size' AND A -> C=Product (req) 'Color'. When A=None both B and C hidden (cart unblocked). When A has real value both B and C appear; cart blocked until both filled. Base product ID: fc267b5c-40d1-4223-8748-bd7010806af3. Section IDs: A=e306f434-c3f4-4dbf-86b4-1bca06330717, B=df35de5b-8679-4021-946d-62d15124b8ef, C=d0f0ced3-cff9-4a51-874b-b9c0ff90fc7f. Config ID: 9807e7ee-e8a5-4bb1-957e-f540d1b165f8. Slug: agent-test-two-req-siblings-20260413.

CFG_DEEP_CHAIN.notes: VCST-4713 CFG-028. Regression for visibility computation at depth 4. Dependency graph: A=Product (req, root) 'Level A' -> B=Product (opt) 'Level B' -> C=Product (opt) 'Level C' -> D=Product (opt) 'Level D' -> E=Product (opt) 'Level E'. All section types Product. Base product ID: d36b25af-8e8f-42e1-b276-6f3219762a8d. Section IDs: A=07968f25-9ede-4b14-9d6e-616e082c73f6, B=f0ae2e35-d4c9-4585-a98c-963ce9dda9f7, C=ed3f8389-1268-4d65-a82f-3df8b68dad9b, D=58da3be3-f570-4993-a394-9ffcf686960f, E=745749a2-c197-4d15-89bc-806923ae0838. Config ID: b53a01c2-4eb3-484e-9440-bc909498d4b4. Slug: agent-test-deep-4-level-chain-20260413.

CFG_REQ_CHILD_OPT_PARENT.notes: VCST-4713 CFG-029. When A=None -> B hidden and must not block cart; when A=real-value -> B revealed and blocks cart. Dependency graph: A=Product (opt with None, root) 'Add Extras' -> B=Product (req) 'Extra Type'. Base product ID: 9106181f-0b36-4c3f-9b5a-9bb8fdbdec5c. Section IDs: A=7fae5f5e-f219-415a-9efe-b1237ddbf674, B=12186681-772e-4d9b-a311-faef7226c4b7. Config ID: 53625750-7884-4257-a20b-2bf828579372. Slug: agent-test-req-child-opt-parent-20260413.

COUPON_VALID.notes: Template only — NOT seeded. Universal 10% off coupon (all users, usage_limit=100, no expiry). Unblocks CART-014 CART-042 CHK-018 CHK-037. Env var: VALID_COUPON_CODE.

PROD_OOS.notes: Template only — NOT seeded. Permanent OOS fixture (stock=0 all FCs, never restocked). Unblocks CART-046 CART-082. Env var: OOS_SKU.

PROD_LOW_STOCK.notes: Template only — NOT seeded. Near-limit stock fixture (stock=5). Must not go OOS. Unblocks CART-037. Env var: LOW_STOCK_SKU.

PROD_PACK_SIZE.notes: Template only — NOT seeded. MOQ=6 pack-size fixture (requires MinQuantity property set on product). Unblocks CART-054 CART-055. Env var: PACK_SIZE_SKU.

PROD_TIER_PRICED.notes: Template only — NOT seeded. Tier pricing: 1-9 std, 10-19 -10%, 20+ -20% (see pricing/prices.csv PR-TIER-001..003). Unblocks CART-078. Env var: TIER_PRICED_SKU.

PROD_CONFIGURABLE.notes: Reuses existing CFG-001 Configurable Hat as the canonical configurable fixture for cart-merge scenarios. Unblocks CART-061. Env var: CONFIGURABLE_SKU.

BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.notes: B2B parent product buyable at qty=1, no max cap (max_qty=0 means unlimited). Verified 2026-04-29: addItem(qty:1) returns itemsCount=1, validationErrors=[]. Canvas Pencil Case GUID b3f5bd0c-45e4-46dc-8f2d-ad089718fc32. For GraphQL xCart suites (050b1, 050k) that need addItem(qty:1) to succeed without PRODUCT_MIN_MAX_QTY rejection. Root cause: original setup_prod filter returned parent 8e0eaa82 with min_qty=10, causing silent rejection (REG-2026-04-29-0929 / BUG-050b1-001).

USER_MULTI_ORG.notes: Template only — NOT seeded. Member of 2+ B2B orgs (ORG-001 AcmeCorp + ORG-002 TechFlow) simultaneously. Triggers org-selector UI in cart. Unblocks CART-052 CART-053. Env vars: MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL, MULTI_ORG_USER_PASSWORD.

USER_EUR.notes: Reuses existing USR-011 (Hans Mueller — EU admin with multi-language + EUR currency). Unblocks CART-059. Env vars: EUR_USER_EMAIL, EUR_USER_PASSWORD.

TECHFLOW_ORG_ADDRESSES.notes: VCST-4710 OQ-5 seed 2026-04-23. 20 new addresses (10 US, 5 CA, 5 UK) plus 2 pre-existing. Unblocks SF-004/006/007/009/010/012 (list/search/facet/sort) and GQ-003/004/005 (currentOrganizationAddresses). Full per-address IDs in test-data/addresses/_seed-results-techflow-20260423.json. Known caveat: platform CustomerAddress schema has no isFavorite field — storefront MemberAddressType returns isFavorite=false for all 20 after seed; toggle favorite via storefront UI if needed.

TECHFLOW_ADDR_US_NEW_YORK.notes: VCST-4710 seed — primary US/NY address fixture for facet/filter/sort tests.

TECHFLOW_ADDR_CA_TORONTO.notes: VCST-4710 seed — primary CA/ON address fixture for multi-country facet tests.

TECHFLOW_ADDR_UK_LONDON.notes: VCST-4710 seed — default org address (isDefault=true). Primary UK/ENG fixture for GB country-facet tests.

ADDR_SINGLE_CHAR_TERM.notes: VCST-4710 SA-010 BVA lower-boundary search term for address-popup search field. Single character. Expected to match any address containing 'N' (most addresses).

ADDR_NO_MATCH_TERM.notes: VCST-4710 SA-009 EP empty-results search term for address-popup search field. Guaranteed not to match any seeded address; drives the no-results empty state.

USER2.name: Personal test account (no org membership)
USER2.notes: Credentials resolved at runtime from .env USER2_EMAIL / USER2_PASSWORD — per feedback_agents_read_env_creds, passwords are NEVER stored inline. Live-verified 2026-04-24: address popup shows 2 facets (Country+City), 5-column table (Recipient name/Address/Phone/Email/Active), 1 address (Albania, null regionId). Used for personal-account popup schema tests (SA-024/025/026/029 in suite 081).

ORG_USER_DEFAULT.notes: Default B2B org user for bucket-D preflight `[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]`. Resolves to USR-015 (acme_store_maintainer_1@acme.com / Password1!) seeded in QA env. Matches .env ORG_USER_EMAIL / ORG_USER_PASSWORD. Added 2026-04-24 as part of preflight-tag rollout.

ORG_XSS.notes: Golden Rule DV-017 fixture — XSS payload for organization-name validation tests (GQL-030). Keeps the literal '<script>alert(1)</script>Org' out of CSV cells.

PHONE_XSS_HTML.notes: HTML-injection payload for phone-field validation (GQL-031). NoHtmlTags validator should reject.

PHONE_OVERSIZED.notes: 65-char string exceeding MaxLength(64) on Contact.phones — boundary fixture for GQL-031.

ADDR_LINE1_XSS.notes: HTML-injection payload for address line1 validation (GQL-032).

ADDRESS_SEARCH.notes: VCST-4710 GAP-01 needles for checkout address-popup search/facet/sort. All needles derived from existing TechFlow snapshot (no new seeding required, 2026-04-30). Counts: USA=12, CAN=5, GBR=5, total=22. Per project_address_state_facet.md, state/province facet only renders for USA/CAN — GBR addresses must hide it. Multi-match needles guarantee >1 row to validate filter behavior. Re-snapshot to a NEW filename if address set changes; do NOT mutate the 20260423 file.

COUPONS.freeShippingCode_value: Free shipping ($999 off shipping cost), expires 2026-12-31
COUPONS.expiredCode_value: Coupon on inactive promotion — must be rejected
COUPONS.usedUpCode_value: Pre-used coupon at total limit — second use rejected. PRECONDITION: requires one prior redemption by USER_EMAIL before test runs.
COUPONS.invalidCode_value: String only — never seeded; expected 'invalid coupon' rejection
COUPONS.bestRewardActive_source: project_promotion_engine.md — QA store uses BestRewardPromotionPolicy (default for B2B-store). When applying multiple eligible promotions, the engine selects the single best discount; coupon-backed rewards win ties over automatic ones.
COUPONS.notes: VCST-4896 GAP-03 coupons-sidebar fixtures. PROVISIONED — all five seeded codes already exist in QA env via promotions/coupons.csv (no new seeding done). usedUpCode requires 1-time redemption pre-step before each test run. invalidCode is a literal random string (do NOT seed). bestRewardActive=true means tests must expect winner-take-all reward selection, not stacking. Tag any new admin-side coupons created during test runs with prefix 'AGENT-TEST-CPN-' for /qa-seed-data teardown.

BOPIS.lastPageIndex_convention: 1-based; position N (1..totalCount). For 0-based array index use lastPageIndex - 1 = 101.
BOPIS.testProductName: Dry Erase Blank Playing Card Reusable Blank Cards Board Game Cards Study Guide & Note Cards Word or Math Training Teaching Aids
BOPIS.testProduct_source_query: products(storeId:"B2B-store", cultureName:"en-US", first:5) on FRONT_URL/graphql — first item with availabilityData.isAvailable=true and price.actual.amount>0
BOPIS.testProduct_bopis_eligibility: RUNTIME_VERIFY — store-level pickup is enabled (102 indexed locations for B2B-store); per-product BOPIS flag was not exposed by storefront xAPI products() at capture time. If checkout shows no pickup option for ALCOE2300, swap to another in-stock product or seed a known-BOPIS SKU before BOPIS-092/093/080 run.
BOPIS.admin_endpoint: POST {BACK_URL}/api/shipping/pickup-locations/search (returns 157 cross-store; storefront filter narrows to 102 for B2B-store)
BOPIS.cursor_convention: after=N is exclusive — pass after='49' to start at position 50, after='50' to start at position 51.
BOPIS.notes: VCST-4707 / Sprint 26-08 GAP-05 (BOPIS-092/093/080). PROVISIONED — no seeding required; QA already has 102 indexed pickup locations for B2B-store (well above 51 threshold). locationCount/lastPageIndex sourced from live storefront xAPI pickupLocations query. pageSize=50 verified by paging first=50 then after='50'. indexedSearchEnabled=true confirmed via GET /api/shipping/pickup-locations/indexedSearchEnabled (per VCST-4631 flag). Position-50/51 ids are stable as long as the underlying dataset and default sort don't change — re-snapshot to a NEW filename if the count or ordering shifts (do NOT mutate the 20260430 file). Existing BOPIS_DOWNTOWN/MALL/BEACH aliases reference pickup-locations.csv which is the legacy CSV-driven seed pool (BOPIS-LOC-001..050) and is NOT directly tied to this live-environment snapshot. testSku/testProductId added 2026-04-30 for BOPIS-092/093/080 'add product to cart before testing pickup pre-selection' steps — ALCOE2300 chosen because it was the first storefront-visible product with isAvailable=true and a positive price; B2B virtual catalog id at capture was 9238c387-d779-40cb-b27d-5496a670a924 (NOT the fc596540... id referenced by older memory notes — that filter returned 0 products on this date). BOPIS eligibility for this specific SKU was not directly confirmed via xAPI; treat as RUNTIME_VERIFY and swap if needed.

IMPERSONATION_ADMIN.notes: VCST-4725 GAP-09 Page Builder preview impersonation. PROVISIONED 2026-04-30. Created via POST /api/platform/security/users/create with isAdministrator=true. AGENT-TEST- prefixed (cleanup via /qa-seed-data teardown). Credentials live in .env (IMPERSONATION_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD) per feedback_agents_read_env_creds — NEVER inline plaintext. CAVEAT: live Platform permissions registry has 0 matches for /impersonat/i across 301 perms — exact permission key for Page Builder impersonation could not be resolved within the 5-minute investigation budget. Falling back to Administrator role (isAdministrator=true) which grants the superset. If a granular permission key is later identified (likely shipped by a CMS / Page Builder / x-portal module), update this alias and downgrade the role. Target customer reuses TECHFLOW_BUYER (USR-007) — no new customer created; orgId is the existing seeded TechFlow org.

CFG_FILE_HOODIE.productName: Hoodie Base with Only File non required
CFG_FILE_HOODIE.categoryPath: Products with Options > Configurable Caps & Shirts
CFG_FILE_HOODIE.notes: VCST-4826 / VCST-4825 GAP — moves the hardcoded product path out of CFG-FILE-ST-001..003 + CFG-FILE-BVA-001..002. CFG-004 is a Configurable hoodie with exactly one optional File section (None option present, max 5 files, max 9.5MB each). For BVA cases use maxFiles=5 (boundary). For ST cases use the (url, fileSectionId) pair. fileSectionId resolved live from xAPI 2026-04-30 — re-introspect if the underlying product configuration is reseeded.

candidates_in_registry: CFG_REQ_CHILD_OPT_PARENT / CFG-029 — Required child of optional parent
CFG_PRODUCT_CONDITIONAL_DEFERRED.notes: VCST-4713 GAP-02 — alias intentionally NOT registered. The variationParentUrl field is redundant: 8 conditional-section CFG products (CFG-022..029) already exist as full aliases in this registry, each with a 'url' field resolved from products/configurable-products.csv. Test cases should reference one of those existing aliases (e.g., @td(CFG_TEXT_DRIVEN_COND.url)) instead of a separate ADDRESS_SEARCH-style needle. UNBLOCKER: if VCST-4713 needs a *new* product schema (e.g., text section toggling file section visibility, not yet covered by 022-029), seed it via the existing seed pipeline at scripts/seed/configurable-products and add a new CFG_* alias entry — do not retrofit a generic 'variationParentUrl' field that loses traceability to the specific section graph.

ADMIN_DEFAULT.email_env: (none — userName 'admin' is the platform login, not an email; resolved from .env ADMIN)
ADMIN_DEFAULT.email_value_source: GET /api/platform/security/users/admin (admin userType='Administrator' carries no contact/email row in QA env beyond the static demo-store value)
ADMIN_DEFAULT.auth_verified_via: POST {BACK_URL}/connect/token grant_type=password username=$ADMIN password=$ADMIN_PASSWORD scope=offline_access — returned access_token (length 1582) plus refresh_token; GET /api/platform/security/currentuser returned isAdministrator:true id:1eb2fa8ac6574541afdb525833dadb46
ADMIN_DEFAULT.notes: Sprint 26-08 review — provisioned 2026-04-30 to satisfy [PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ADMIN_DEFAULT] in ORD-091..095 (017-orders-admin-management.csv) and CFG-E2E-073-COND (072b-configurable-products-e2e.csv). Resolves to the platform built-in admin user. Per feedback_agents_read_env_creds, the alias references env vars (ADMIN, ADMIN_PASSWORD) — runners must read .env at runtime; NEVER inline plaintext. The semantic 'roles' array reports ['Administrator'] because isAdministrator=true grants the Administrator superset; the 'explicit_role_assignments' field captures the additional non-superset roles attached to this user record (Theme settings changer, SQL queries) for traceability. userId is the GUID-without-hyphens form returned by /api/platform/security/users/admin and /api/platform/security/currentuser — preserve as-is, it is the canonical platform Identity user id.

validPdf.generator: scripts/inline node — handcrafted minimal PDF/1.4 (Catalog, Pages, single Page with Helvetica text 'CFG-PDP-048 test fixture - 1 page')
validPdf._purpose: CFG-PDP-048 happy-path File section upload. Stays well under @td(CFG_FILE_HOODIE.maxFileSizeMb)=9.5 MB and exercises a real PDF MIME type (not octet-stream). Single-page so the configuration preview / receipt rendering paths can render predictably. Re-generate (do NOT mutate this file in place) if the underlying validator changes (e.g., PDF/A required, signature required); update sha256 + sizeBytes if regenerated.

CFG_TEXT_INPUTS.notes: Sprint 26-08 review — literal-value alias for configurable Text section Custom-input tests (CFG-PDP-050-COND in 072-configurable-products-ui.csv). 'customValue' is a deterministic alphanumeric+hyphen string of length 22, safely under the smallest known Text section maxLength in the registry (CFG_RING.maxLength=30) so the same value works whether the underlying product is CFG_RING (max 30), CFG_GIFTBOX (max 100), CFG_TEXT_DRIVEN_COND, or any other Text-section product. No special chars (no quotes/backslashes) so it survives JSON/CSV/GraphQL escaping without modification. 'maxLength' is an echo for tests that want to assert against the cap; populated as 30 to match the strictest registered Text section. 'presetOptionId' is null because no preset is required for the Custom-input cascade test (CFG-PDP-050-COND types into the Custom input, it does not select a preset)—populate per-product if a future preset-aware test needs it. Per project_configurable_text_section_validation.md, maxLength applies to Custom input only, so this value is sized for Custom-input scenarios. NOT a discovery alias — no API call needed; safe to consume directly via @td(CFG_TEXT_INPUTS.customValue).

SEARCH_QUERY.verified_via: POST {BACK_URL}/graphql products(storeId:"B2B-store", query:"ring", first:5) — totalCount=77 (well above the >=3 threshold in SRCH-NEW-055)
SEARCH_QUERY.notes: Sprint 26-08 review — generic search term that returns multiple hits on the QA storefront, used by SRCH-NEW-055 in 004-search-core.csv (mobile results page layout at 375px). 'ring' was chosen because (a) it was already named as the in-line fallback in SRCH-NEW-055 Steps, (b) it returned totalCount=77 in live xAPI verification on 2026-04-30 (against the active B2B virtual catalog root 9238c387-d779-40cb-b27d-5496a670a924 — see feedback_graphql_products_filter.md), and (c) it is short, lowercase, ASCII-only, so it round-trips through URL/query-string/CSV without escaping concerns. expectedMinHits=77 is a snapshot of the verification count, not a runtime assertion target — tests should still assert >=3 results (per SRCH-NEW-055 precondition) so the suite stays env-resilient if the catalog churns. Per feedback_env_resilience.md, do NOT promote this alias to assert the exact count of 77.
